creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hi Pavel,

I made some changes to the Makefile and pkg-descr.  Would you mind
reviewing them and let me know if they look OK to you or not?  If they
do, I'll go ahead and add the port to the tree.

Here's what I did:

- - Minor variable cleanups
- - Added LDCONFIG (portlint warning)
- - Suppressed shell output
- - Install SQL and README files into EXAMPLESDIR and DOCSDIR,
respectively, instead of DATADIR
- - Changed option logic so all three modules can be built/installed at
the same time
- - Added CONFLICTS

http://people.freebsd.org/~glarkin/shars/sqlite-ext-mobigroup.shar

Thank you,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin

http://www.FreeBSD.org/           - The Power To Serve
http://www.sourcehosting.net/     - Ready. Set. Code.
http://twitter.com/sourcehosting/ - Follow me, follow you
